title: Cranc Illa de Menorca Festival
description: An intimate, relaxed and crowd-free indie, electronic and pop music festival in a Biosphere Reserve setting. It celebrates its tenth anniversary from 17 to 19 September 2026 in Maó, with side activities on the 16th and 20th. It defines itself as 'small, sustainable and close to the stage', with a line-up mixing international names and local acts such as Kakkmaddafakka, The Blaze (DJ set) and Soleá Morente.
